measurement_note: Size is n, the shared number of students and sandwiches. Each legal tier starts with n/2 square-preferring students followed by n/2 circular-preferring students, while sandwich types alternate circular then square. Everyone eats, but a literal deque simulation repeatedly rotates nearly half the remaining queue and takes O(n^2) time. The Accepted two-counter scan and an independent two-sum count implementation take O(n) time.

cases.name: benchmark: 8 alternating requests across preference blocks
benchmark: 32 alternating requests across preference blocks
benchmark: 100 alternating requests across preference blocks
